WITN09980600
WITN09980600

273.2 a Speak Up Board Champion was appointed (previous NED Zarin Patel (who also sat on the RC), who was subsequently replaced by Amanda Burton) to oversee the whistleblowing procedures replacing myself as sponsor. This was formally approved at the ARC meeting on 30 March 2021;

273.3 Meetings were held with the Whistleblowing Champion on at least a quarterly basis;

273.4 the creation of a designated role as POL's "whistleblowing manager" to oversee POL's whistleblowing procedures and activities;

273.5 there was a policy review by external lawyers, HSF (who were instructed with overseeing the GLO), of the Whistleblowing Policy, the Postmaster Complaints Policy (which the Retail team were accountable for), and the Investigations Policy to ensure better of triage and coordination of potential whistleblowing across the organisation. A centralised Postmaster Complaints dashboard which can be viewed alongside the whistleblowing dashboard to track any Postmaster complaints that should be captured was also created;

273.6 training to all employees on whistleblowing with subsequent improved communications through a variety of channels internally and to Postmasters; and

273.7 more communications to Postmasters was undertaken which was coordinated with the Retail and Communications team.

Page 107 of 124
